nodes.title: Rewrite scenario-dashboard TUI
nodes.description: Replace the 267-line bare-minimum status printer with a proper terminal UI: alternate screen, SIGWINCH/SIGTSTP handling, widget dashboard layout, TEA state machine reuse, diff-based rendering, and keyboard navigation.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":90,"prompt":"Completed: 11 new files (~1,350 lines), 60 tests all passing. Replaced 267-line bare-minimum status printer with full TUI: alternate screen, SIGWINCH/SIGTSTP, diff-based renderer, 2x2 widget dashboard, TEA state machine reuse, keyboard navigation, filter mode. Backward-compatible renderTuiFrame/collectTuiSnapshot preserved."}

nodes.title: Custom immediate-mode renderer (no Ink framework)
nodes.description: Ink adds React as a dependency; the web dashboard uses Preact/Fresh. The TEA state machine already exists. Monitoring dashboards (btop, htop, k9s) all use custom renderers. Build a ScreenBuffer with diff-based output instead.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":85,"prompt":"Built ScreenBuffer class (2D cell array, diff algorithm, ANSI output), semantic color palette, box drawing, alternate screen enter/exit, cursor hide/show. No external TUI framework dependency."}

nodes.title: Reuse TEA state machine with direct-service runtime
nodes.description: The web dashboard has a full TEA architecture (DashboardState + Msg + update + Cmd). The TUI reuses all of this unchanged. Only the Cmd interpreter differs: TUI runtime maps Cmd.fetch URLs to direct service method calls instead of HTTP fetches.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":92,"prompt":"TUI runtime maps Cmd.fetch URLs to direct service method calls (networkManager, runManager, db queries, scenarioDiscovery, topologyService). DashboardState + Msg + update() reused unchanged. Boot cmds, tick timer, and schedule cmds all work."}

nodes.title: Widget dashboard layout (btop/bottom pattern)
nodes.description: The scenario-dashboard is a monitoring/observability tool. The canonical layout is the widget dashboard: 2x2 grid with 4 focusable panels (Network, Scenarios, Active Run, History). Numeric keys 1-4 jump to panels. Tab cycles. Responsive: vertical stack below 100 cols.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":88,"prompt":"2x2 grid on wide terminals (>=100 cols), vertical stack on narrow. Four panels: Network (top-left), Scenarios (bottom-left), Active Run (top-right), History (bottom-right). Status bar + hint bar. Focus ring with Tab/Shift+Tab and 1-4 numeric jump."}

nodes.title: Phase 1: Terminal hygiene — renderer.ts + input.ts
nodes.description: ScreenBuffer class (2D cell array, diff, ANSI output), alternate screen enter/exit, cursor hide/show, color helpers, key parser (escape sequences, multi-byte, modifiers), SIGWINCH/SIGTSTP/panic-safe handling.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":90,"files":["scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/renderer.ts","scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/input.ts"],"prompt":"renderer.ts: ScreenBuffer (2D cell array), diff algorithm (minimal ANSI), fullRedraw, box/boxTitle, fillRect, write, color palette (COLORS), style helpers (fg, bg, bold, dim, reverse, underline), enterTerminalMode/exitTerminalMode, writeToTerminal, isTerminal, getTerminalSize. input.ts: parseKey (escape sequences, Ctrl/Alt/Shift, arrows, F-keys, multi-byte UTF-8), readKeys async generator, isKey/isCtrl/isQuit helpers. 17+26=43 tests passing."}

nodes.title: Phase 2: Layout engine — layout.ts + focus.ts
nodes.description: computeLayout(cols, rows) for 2x2 grid (wide) or vertical stack (narrow). FocusRing class: Tab/Shift+Tab cycling, 1-4 numeric jump, focus change events.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":90,"files":["scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/layout.ts","scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/focus.ts"],"prompt":"layout.ts: computeLayout (wide 2x2 grid >=100 cols, vertical stack <100 cols), panelContentArea, findPanel, PANEL_IDS, PANEL_TITLES. focus.ts: FocusRing class (next/prev cycling, jump/jumpTo, isFocused, reset). 10+7=17 tests passing."}

nodes.title: Phase 3: TUI runtime — tui/runtime.ts
nodes.description: Interprets Cmd.fetch as direct service method calls (URL→method mapping). Reuses DashboardState + Msg + update() unchanged. schedule cmd same as web runtime. navigate cmd no-op. Boot cmds same.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":88,"files":["scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/runtime.ts"],"prompt":"tui/runtime.ts: createTuiRuntime returns TuiRuntimeHandle with dispatch, onChange, destroy. Resolves Cmd.fetch URLs to service method calls via resolveServiceHandler. Handles /api/network/*, /api/runs/*, /api/scenarios, /api/topologies/*, /api/runs/:id/*. Boot cmds + 1s tick timer. constructMsg/constructErrorMsg map response data to Msg types."}

nodes.title: Phase 4: View layer — view.ts + panels/
nodes.description: renderView(state, layout, focus) paints ScreenBuffer. Status bar + hint bar. Panel renderers: network.ts (service table + actions), scenarios.ts (categories + coverage + filter), run.ts (progress bar + current scenario), history.ts (recent runs + metrics).
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":85,"files":["scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/view.ts","scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/panels/network.ts","scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/panels/scenarios.ts","scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/panels/run.ts","scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui/panels/history.ts"],"prompt":"view.ts: renderView composes status bar + hint bar + panel borders + panel content. Recent runs passed as parameter (no DB import). panels/network.ts: service table with status dots/badges. panels/scenarios.ts: category groups, search filter, coverage stats. panels/run.ts: progress bar, elapsed time, activity indicator. panels/history.ts: recent runs list, container metrics."}

nodes.title: Phase 5: Event loop — tui.ts rewrite
nodes.description: Enter alternate screen, hide cursor, set raw mode. Create TUI runtime. Compute initial layout. Event loop: key input → dispatch Msg → state change → render → diff → write. On quit: exit alternate screen, show cursor, restore raw mode.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":88,"files":["scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui.ts"],"prompt":"tui.ts: Full rewrite. runDashboardTui entry point. One-shot mode (renderOnce) for non-TTY. Interactive mode: enterTerminalMode, SIGWINCH/SIGTSTP handlers, event loop (readKeys → handleKey → dispatch Msg → renderAndWrite), filter mode, help overlay. Backward-compatible renderTuiFrame/collectTuiSnapshot/DashboardTuiSnapshot preserved. Exit cleanup in finally block."}

nodes.title: Phase 6: Keybinding design
nodes.description: Global: q/Ctrl+C quit, 1-4 jump panel, Tab cycle, ? help, r refresh. Network: s start, p pds2, x stop. Scenarios: Up/Down navigate, Enter run, / filter, Esc clear, Space toggle category. Run: Ctrl+C stop, R restart. History: Up/Down navigate, Enter view logs, R restart.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":85,"prompt":"Global: q/Ctrl+C quit, 1-4 panel jump, Tab/Shift+Tab cycle, ? help, r refresh. Network: s start, p pds2, x stop. Scenarios: Enter run all, / filter, Space toggle category. Run: Ctrl+C stop, R restart. History: R restart. Filter mode: Escape/Ctrl+C clear, Enter accept, Backspace delete, printable chars append."}

nodes.title: Phase 7: Tests + integration
nodes.description: renderer_test.ts, input_test.ts, layout_test.ts, focus_test.ts. Update tui_test.ts. Update cli.ts imports. Update deno.json check task.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":85,"files":["scripts/scenario-dashboard/tui_test.ts","scripts/scenario-dashboard/cli.ts","scripts/scenario-dashboard/deno.json"],"prompt":"renderer_test.ts (17 tests), input_test.ts (26 tests), layout_test.ts (10 tests), focus_test.ts (7 tests) = 60 tests all passing. Existing tui_test.ts backward-compat test passing. deno.json updated: check task includes tui/mod.ts, publish includes tui/**/*.ts. All dashboard modules type-check clean."}

nodes.title: Package API redesign for Deno/JSR clarity
nodes.description: Refactor Garazyk package roots into curated Deno/JSR public APIs, move legacy and side-effectful modules to explicit subpaths, and track implementation through scratchpads.
nodes.metadata_json: {"branch":"refactor/deno-packages","confidence":90,"prompt":"review apis of each package and think deeply about good api design in deno (use skills); PLEASE IMPLEMENT THIS PLAN: Garazyk Package API Redesign And Deciduous Tracking"}

nodes.title: Root exports are curated stable APIs
nodes.description: Package root exports should expose only stable Deno/JSR consumer APIs; broad barrels and implementation conveniences move to explicit subpaths.

nodes.title: Legacy orchestration moves to explicit subpaths
nodes.description: ATProto local-network orchestration remains available but is no longer exported from generic package roots.

nodes.title: Generated lexicon types are documented or hidden from root docs
nodes.description: The full generated lexicon surface moves to an explicit subpath; root exposes only stable client-facing generated helper types needed by XrpcClient.

nodes.title: Scenario globals remain compatibility-only
nodes.description: Mutable hamownia scenario globals stay on @garazyk/hamownia/config for compatibility while new code uses explicit scenario config factories.

nodes.title: Phase 1: tracking and API inventory
nodes.description: Create scratchpads, Deciduous nodes, and baseline verification records.

nodes.title: Phase 2: export map design
nodes.description: Add explicit package subpath exports and replace broad root barrels with curated named exports.

nodes.title: Phase 3: laweta boundary cleanup
nodes.description: Keep laweta root generic and move ATProto local-network orchestration to an explicit subpath.

nodes.title: Phase 4: gruszka typing cleanup
nodes.description: Focus gruszka root on the generated typed XRPC client and move hand-written convenience clients to a legacy subpath.

nodes.title: Phase 5: schemat purity split
nodes.description: Separate pure topology/schema APIs from runtime env/git/run-directory helpers.

nodes.title: Phase 6: hamownia config split
nodes.description: Keep hamownia root focused on scenario authoring and move mutable scenario globals to a config subpath with pure factories.

nodes.title: Phase 7: documentation and verification
nodes.description: Add public module docs, deprecation notes, import smoke tests, and verification log outcomes.

nodes.description: Scratchpads and Deciduous nodes created; baseline verification captured. Commit: not created in this turn.

nodes.title: Phase 2 export map design complete
nodes.description: Package deno.json files now expose explicit subpaths and curated roots. Commit: not created in this turn.

nodes.title: Phase 3 laweta boundary cleanup complete
nodes.description: Laweta root is generic Docker primitives and no longer imports schemat or hamownia. Commit: not created in this turn.

nodes.title: Phase 4 gruszka typing cleanup complete
nodes.description: Root exposes XrpcClient, transport, RawClient, firehose, compact generated proxy aliases, and legacy clients on subpath. Commit: not created in this turn.

nodes.title: Phase 5 schemat purity split complete
nodes.description: Schemat root keeps pure topology APIs and runtime helpers moved to explicit runtime subpath. Commit: not created in this turn.

nodes.title: Phase 6 hamownia config split complete
nodes.description: Hamownia root is scenario authoring API; config globals moved to config subpath with createScenarioConfig. Commit: not created in this turn.

nodes.title: Phase 7 documentation and verification complete
nodes.description: Root module docs, focused public API smoke tests, doc lint, checks, boundaries, package tests, scripts check, and dashboard check completed. Commit: not created in this turn.

nodes.title: Extract all TypeScript library logic from scripts/ into JSR packages
nodes.description: Move reusable code from scripts/ into packages/. After: scripts/ = thin CLI wrappers + test fixtures + one-offs only. New package: narzedzia. Expand: gruszka, hamownia, schemat. Relocate: scenario-dashboard → packages/dashboard.

nodes.title: Phase 0: Create @garazyk/narzedzia package
nodes.description: New package for dev-tooling: doc-coverage, tsdoc-coverage, repo-docs, boundary-check, spdx-headers, vitepress-migration. Move logic from scripts/docs/ and scripts/dev/ into packages/narzedzia/.

nodes.title: Phase 1: Expand @garazyk/gruszka (chat-viewer, account-ops)
nodes.description: Add chat-viewer sub-export (TUI rendering from show_chat.ts) and account-ops sub-export (invite code gen, password gen from create_account.ts).

nodes.title: Phase 2: Expand @garazyk/hamownia (mock-twilio server, account-discovery, invite-code, pds-cli)
nodes.description: Absorb mock-twilio server impl. Add account-discovery (SSH/admin-API PDS DB querying), invite-code (SSH-based ops), pds-cli (binary execution + XRPC ops).

nodes.title: Phase 3: Rewrite chat scripts to use packages
nodes.description: Rewrite create_chat_convos.ts, check_chat_messages.ts, show_chat.ts to import from gruszka/seed and hamownia/account-discovery instead of duplicating XRPC/chat logic.

nodes.title: Phase 4: Move scenario-dashboard to packages/
nodes.description: mv scripts/scenario-dashboard packages/dashboard. Update workspace, imports, task entries. Rename to @garazyk/dashboard.

nodes.title: Phase 5: Expand @garazyk/schemat (web-client-compose)
nodes.description: Move YAML/Dockerfile rendering from render_web_client_compose.ts into packages/schemat/web_client_compose.ts.

nodes.title: Phase 6: Rewrite remaining scripts to use packages
nodes.description: Rewrite create_account.ts, mock-twilio-server.ts, pds_cli.ts, and all docs/ scripts as thin CLI wrappers.

nodes.title: Phase 7: Update workspace, boundary checks, CI
nodes.description: Update root deno.json workspace, boundary check rules, deno task entries. Add narzedzia and dashboard to package list.

nodes.title: Package API redesign fully implemented and verified
nodes.description: All 7 phases complete. Root barrels curated for laweta, gruszka, schemat, hamownia. Orchestration moved to hamownia/atproto_network.ts. Explicit subpaths added (atproto-runtime, legacy-clients, lexicons, runtime, topology-schema, config). All laweta→schemat/hamownia boundary violations removed (17→2 test-only). createScenarioConfig() added. Public API smoke tests for all 4 packages. 192 tests passing. deno check, deno task boundaries, deno doc --lint all green.

nodes.title: Scripts-to-Packages refactor fully implemented and verified with zero library logic remaining in scripts/

nodes.title: Ergonomic polish of package APIs

nodes.title: Built-in topologies use typed authoring only
nodes.description: All registry presets should be authored through defineTopology helpers rather than raw JSON-style objects or a raw bridge.

nodes.title: Convert topology presets and registry to typed API

nodes.description: Leave scripts/docs/api removed rather than regenerate docs that still reference removed raw topology symbols.

nodes.title: Remove stale topology JSON and docs surfaces
Typed topology presets committed
nodes.description: Converted built-ins to defineTopology helpers and removed raw registry authoring affordances while preserving manifest and compose compilation coverage.

nodes.title: Scenario requirements typed-only committed
nodes.description: Scenario manifests and normalization now accept typed requirement objects, with compile-time tests rejecting strings and wrong-role capabilities.

nodes.title: Stale topology docs and JSON presets removed
nodes.description: Deleted generated API docs and JSON topology preset files for this branch, updated migration guidance, and removed stale raw symbol scratchpad references.

nodes.title: Typed-only topology cleanup verified

nodes.title: Harden laweta Docker client internals
nodes.description: Fix Docker API container path encoding, shared NDJSON parsing, quiet unavailable daemon checks, stats sampler overlap, and cumulative telemetry deltas without changing public root exports.

nodes.title: Fix laweta stats sampler scheduling and counters
nodes.description: Prevent timer-triggered sample overlap, keep direct samples independent, emit telemetry deltas for cumulative counters, and preserve memory pressure behavior.

nodes.title: Clean laweta lint and format gates
nodes.description: Remove unused internal imports and apply package markdown formatting so laweta lint and fmt checks pass.

nodes.title: Encode Docker container paths and share NDJSON parsing
nodes.description: Use a private containerPath helper for Docker API container endpoints, centralize stream parsing, and reduce expected Docker unavailable logs to debug output.

nodes.title: Docker API paths and streams hardened
nodes.description: Container IDs and names are encoded as a single path segment, streamEvents and streamContainerStats share NDJSON parsing, malformed lines are debug-logged and skipped, and daemon discovery failures no longer warn for expected unavailable Docker cases.

nodes.title: Stats sampler scheduling and counter deltas fixed
nodes.description: Scheduled samples no longer overlap, stop waits for an in-flight scheduled sample before taking a final direct sample, direct sample calls remain independent, and cumulative Docker counters emit only positive deltas after baselining.

nodes.title: Laweta package gates cleaned
nodes.description: Removed unused internal health imports and applied package markdown formatting so lint and fmt checks pass for packages/laweta.
